sections.heading: About Paragon Power LLC
body: Beauty, honor, and longevity are the pillars that we will continue to build the country upon. From replacing a burnt out receptacle in a home to renovating restaurants to electrifying infrastructure we will always pursue excellence.

items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

sections.heading: Work with Paragon Power LLC
sections.body: Find us at 1821 Sansone Dr. Call (707) 696-9658 — we’re glad to help.
